notes: New ✨ Fortunes tab. A dedicated home for the boons & banes system: see your active effects with time-left bars and one-click clear buttons for banes, the 📡 signals currently on your scope (Investigate when you're there, or Travel to them), and an Almanac that fills in as you discover each effect — every one you've experienced is revealed, the rest stay ??? as a collection goal. The Ship sidebar keeps a compact at-a-glance view. Unlocks once a Fortune or signal first appears.
